theta.description: M2.5 targeted shared EKF estimate pollution probe: GNSS timestamp delay mismatch with low GPS noise and a finite sine setpoint to excite velocity-estimate phase error.

m2_5.fairness: boot_px4_params and px4_params are identical for classical and RAPTOR runs
m2_5.purpose: targeted EKF/GPS delay gradient, not a full M2 rerun
